deep_dive.title: OmniSpace: Efficient Geometry Awareness for Autonomous Vehicles MLLMs
deep_dive.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on 2D visual tasks, yet enhancing their spatial intelligence for real-world applications such as Autonomous Vehicles (AV) remains an open challenge. Existing geometry-aware MLLMs typically rely on auxiliary 3D models at inference time, introducing pipeline complexity and the risk of cascading failures. In this paper, we present OmniSpace, a simple yet effective plug-and-play paradigm for geometry-aware spatial reasoning from purely 2D observations. Motivated by our finding that current MLLMs are bottlenecked by weak cross-view correspondence and depth estimation, OmniSpace introduces a Camera Pose Injector, a Multi-view Epipolar Attention module, and a 3D Geometric Distillation objective that jointly address these two limitations by transferring geometric knowledge into the model. Extensive experiments show that OmniSpace surpasses existing methods on planning benchmarks (nuScenes, Bench2Drive), risk detection (nuInstruct), language (Omnidrive), and generalization (DriveBench).
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: multi-view pure visual geometry for autonomous driving
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向自动驾驶的多视图纯视觉几何感知
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向自动驾驶的多视图纯视觉几何感知
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向自动驾驶的多视图纯视觉几何感知
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a plug-and-play paradigm for geometry-aware spatial reasoning from 2D observations, with Camera Pose Injector and Multi-view Epipolar Attention, directly applicable to multi-view camera-only 3D detection.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前多模态大语言模型在自动驾驶中缺乏几何感知能力，且现有方法依赖辅助3D模型，管线复杂。本文提出OmniSpace，一种即插即用的几何感知范式，仅从2D观测出发，通过设计Camera Pose Injector、多视图极线注意力模块和3D几何蒸馏，有效提升跨视图对应和深度估计能力。实验表明，该范式在不引入3D推理模型的情况下显著增强MLLM的空间智能，可直接用于多视角纯视觉3D目标检测等任务。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前多模态大语言模型在自动驾驶中缺乏几何感知能力，且现有方法依赖辅助3D模型，管线复杂。本文提出OmniSpace，一种即插即用的几何感知范式，仅从2D观测出发，通过设计Camera Pose Injector、多视图极线注意力模块和3D几何蒸馏，有效提升跨视图对应和深度估计能力。实验表明，该范式在不引入3D推理模型的情况下显著增强MLLM的空间智能，可直接用于多视角纯视觉3D目标检测等任务。
